codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies the feature contract. `src/components/MaturityBadge.tsx` now renders `live` as an 8px green dot plus white text, keeps `in_progress`/`planned`/`speculative` as monochrome text-only states, and removes the old colored pill backgrounds. A repo-wide search shows maturity-status consumers all flow through `MaturityBadge`, so the redesign propagates across the updated surfaces without API churn.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The visual-work procedure is not fully auditable from the recorded evidence. The frontend-experience-worker skill requires visual features to read `.factory/library/design-system.md` (and relevant reference material) before implementation, but this worker transcript does not show those reads even though `handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is `true`.

summary: Pass. The code change cleanly replaces the old rainbow maturity badge styling with the required monochrome + green-only system and the test additions cover the new badge contract. Shared-state note: the skill/procedure evidence for visual-library review is not fully auditable from the recorded transcript despite `followedProcedure=true`.
